TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Juan_Manuel_Santos, title = Juan_Manuel_Santos, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Juan_Manuel_Santos} }

S.FORM: Juan Manuel Santos ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 8, Juan Manuel Santos, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1951) mrhuw Columbia ta' misuw hya' ga Juan Manuel Santos, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2010 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Juan Manuel Santos ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 8, Juan Manuel Santos, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1951) mrhuw Columbia ta' misuw hya' ga Juan Manuel Santos, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2010 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *uan manuel s~ɕantos~ɕ rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *uan manuel s~ɕantos~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ʦ~ʨolumβia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *uan manuel s~ɕantos~ɕ, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
